scripts.lint: biome check --formatter-enabled=false --linter-enabled=true --assist-enabled=false astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts src/env.d.ts src/lib/*.ts
scripts.format:check: biome check --formatter-enabled=true --linter-enabled=false --assist-enabled=false astro.config.mjs biome.json package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts src/env.d.ts src/lib/*.ts
scripts.validate: bun run lint && bun run format:check && bun run typecheck && bun run test:validation && bun run test:coverage
